step_title: Engineer the prompt to reduce the token count
note: Step 2 promoted and authored as GC3B1-01 — Cap every prompt template at a declared token budget and fail builds whose token footprint exceeds it. Resumed from the paused budget-principle slot now that substrate GO3B1-01 (template registry + runtime_token_budget.input field) shipped 2026-06-03. Concretises step 2's coaching into an enforceable contract: declared per-template input ceiling + pre-merge footprint-vs-budget lint (Option A: scaffolding tokens via the model tokenizer + sum of variable typical_max, gated against runtime_token_budget.input) + budget-inflation governance lint. Options B (measured-from-eval-harness-fixtures) and C (runtime alarm on GO3B1-01's per-call actual-vs-declared signal) documented as additive alternatives in solution.approach and the RI at user direction; gates and RI built on Option A only. step_promotion rubric 3/3/3/3. Distinct from GO3B1-01 (which mandates the budget field EXISTS) by making the number a binding ceiling — different failure mode (silent token creep vs no addressable template), different focus area (P52 Cost-aware Prompting vs P13 Traceability). ownership.tier enterprise via D1=no / D2=2 → recommended_centralise. serving_paradigm all four mandatory (AWS verbatim: prompt length drives cost in both managed per-token billing and self-hosted compute time). maturity_level scaling (pays off project #2 on GO3B1-01 substrate). impact_level Medium (AWS BP risk Medium). New focus area P52 — Cost-aware Prompting created. Step 1 absorbed; steps 3 (vendor/technique) and 4 (technique menu + process advice) not_promoted. BP01 closed; GENCOST03-BP02 (Control model response length) remains UNMAPPED. Open items: (1) JSON parse not run in-session (sandbox could not reach the UNC workspace mount) — verify from a terminal before pushing; (2) exact GENCOST03 question-stem wording approximated pending a question-page check. This file is the next-BP staging slot — replace with the next anchor when starting the next walk.
